payload.answer: In select-only mode, running SELECT statements is allowed (e.g., `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`), while DELETE statements are denied. Therefore, any SQL request limited to SELECT is conflict-free with the policy; DELETE would be a policy violation.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific entities to resolve were provided beyond the policy description itself.

payload.intent: Explain and apply the Admin SQL select-only mode policy to an SQL request.

details: Policy acknowledged: SELECT allowed; DELETE denied.
No conflicting SQL action was specified other than the illustrative examples.

repair_options: Use only SELECT queries (e.g., add LIMIT/OFFSET as needed).
If data removal is required, defer it to an allowed maintenance workflow rather than executing DELETE directly.
